tasks.title: Host privacy policy at public URL
tasks.done_when: Privacy policy is live at a public HTTPS URL and linked in Play Console.

tasks.title: Register & Setup Google Play Developer account
tasks.done_when: Play Console dashboard is accessible and identity verification is complete.

tasks.title: Build release AAB
tasks.done_when: AAB produced successfully (Verified: Existing at hello_world/build/...)

tasks.title: Submit to Play Console (Internal/Production)
tasks.done_when: App is uploaded to a testing or production track.

tasks.title: Complete Health Connect declaration
tasks.done_when: Google approval received for health data access.

criteria: All security-hardened features verified on device
No references to 'xanax', 'clouds', or 'bubs' remain in active code
Privacy policy renders correctly in mobile browsers
